title: subworkflow - dynatrace close problem
description:
Subworkflow to close a Dynatrace problem

This subworkflow closes a problem after remediation is complete.

Parameters:

problemId: (Required) The problem ID or display ID to close
closeComment: (Optional) Comment to add when closing

Returns confirmation of problem closure
guide:
## 🚀 **Subworkflow to Close a Problem**

✅ This subworkflow closes a Dynatrace problem after remediation is complete.

Enables end-to-end automated remediation workflows with proper problem lifecycle management.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **problemId** (Required): 🆔 Problem ID or display ID to close
- **closeComment** (Optional): 💬 Comment to add when closing

---

### 📋 **Problem Closure**

✅ Marks problem as resolved
✅ Records closure timestamp
✅ Adds closure comment to audit trail

---

### 🧠 **Usage Context**

- ✅ End of remediation workflows
- ✅ Automated problem resolution
- ✅ Problem lifecycle management
- ✅ SLA tracking

---
